hibernate-mapping.query: select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.jobSeq = ?
select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = ?
select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = ? and job.modifiedDate >= ? and job.modifiedDate <= ?
select job from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = ? and job.modifiedDate <= ?
select statusID from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.jobSeq = ?

select job.jobSeq from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = :readyStatus and job.destID in (:destIds) and job.destID not in ( select job.destID from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = :processStatus and job.destID in (:destIds)) order by job.modifiedDate
select job.jobSeq from com.mckesson.eig.output.model.OutputJob job where job.statusID = :readyStatus and job.destID in (:destIds) order by job.modifiedDate
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq FROM Output_Service_Job job where job.osj_status_seq = :status and osj_queue_seq in (:destIds) and (job.Osj_ProcessingServer = :server or job.Osj_ProcessingServer is null) order by job.osj_Modified_Dt

select job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq, job.osj_Created_Dt AS createdDate, job.osj_Created_By_Seq AS createdBy, job.osj_Modified_Dt AS modifiedDate, job.osj_Modified_By_Seq AS modifiedBy, job.osj_Record_Version AS recordVersion, job.osj_Organization_Seq AS orgSeq, job.osj_job_id AS jobName, job.osj_submitted_by AS userName, job.osj_queue_seq AS destID, job.osj_status_seq AS statusID, job.osj_pages AS pages, job.osj_results AS resultsXML, job.osj_OutputServicerequest.extract('/outputRequest/properties/property[key="jobDetails"]/value/text()', 'xmlns="http://eig.mckesson.com/xsd/2009/01"').getStringVal() AS jobDetails FROM Output_Service_Job job

select job.Output_Service_Job_Seq AS jobSeq, job.osj_Created_Dt AS createdDate, job.osj_Created_By_Seq AS createdBy, job.osj_Modified_Dt AS modifiedDate, job.osj_Modified_By_Seq AS modifiedBy, job.osj_Record_Version AS recordVersion, job.osj_Organization_Seq AS orgSeq, job.osj_job_id AS jobName, job.osj_submitted_by AS userName, job.osj_queue_seq AS destID, job.osj_status_seq AS statusID, job.osj_pages AS pages, job.osj_results AS resultsXML, job.osj_OutputServicerequest.extract('/outputRequest/properties/property[key="jobDetails"]/value/text()', 'xmlns="http://eig.mckesson.com/xsd/2009/01"').getStringVal() AS jobDetails FROM Output_Service_Job job where osj_created_dt >= to_date(:T_FROM_DATE, 'mm/dd/yyyy HH24:MI:SS') and osj_created_dt <= to_date(:T_TO_DATE, 'mm/dd/yyyy HH24:MI:SS')
